name: Instruction override language
recommended_action: Quarantine instruction-like text, preserve source provenance, and require safe reformulation.

name: Secret-like value in output
recommended_action: Redact output, inspect provenance, and rotate any real credential.

name: Social engineering pressure pattern
recommended_action: Route to user-protection review and remove deception or urgency scaffolding.

name: Tool call without required approval
recommended_action: Block tool call until specific pre-action approval is received.

name: Cross-connector sensitive action
recommended_action: Require source, destination, data class, reversibility, and owner before execution.

name: Unstable consequential tool selection
recommended_action: Route to slower review before consequential tool use.
